{{Quote|Apparently a Mr. R. Lusoff was making accusations at a Mr. C. Nettic about cheating him in a business deal. Jedi Tooka was dispatched to the scene and restored order.|An information [[Droid/Legends|droid]] during Revan's investigation of Calder Nettic's murder|audio=InfoDroid-Tooka.flac|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
'''Tooka''' was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]].<ref name="KOTOR" /> In [[3956 BBY]],<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' in [[3956 BBY]].</ref> two [[Colonist/Legends|colonists]], [[Calder Nettic]] and [[Rickard Lusoff]], engaged in a [[Alcohol/Legends|drunken]] altercation in a [[Garang spaceport cantina|cantina]] at the [[Garang spaceport|spaceport]] of [[Garang]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of the<ref name="KOTOR" /> [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Campaign">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref> [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. According to the [[Garang municipal authorities|Garang authorities]], after Lusoff accused Nettic of cheating him out of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] in a business deal, Tooka was dispatched to the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] and resolved the conflict. The incident was recorded in the [[Garang archives]] as well as those of the [[Jedi Enclave]]. Later, Nettic was [[Death/Legends|murdered]] by [[Handon Guld]], another colonist, in Dantooine's [[Ancient Grove]]. [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Bolook]] and former [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], who [[Amnesia/Legends|lost]] his memory and [[Jedi training/Legends|retrained]] as a Jedi,<ref name="KOTOR" /> thus investigated the murder.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|374|Guld, Handon}}</ref>
{{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic}}
At the scene, Revan asked an [[Unidentified information droid|information droid]] about Nettic's relationships, and the [[Analysis droid/Legends|droid]] accessed the data regarding the cantina scuffle, including Tooka's involvement.<ref name="KOTOR" />
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
Tooka was mentioned in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', developed by [[BioWare]]. The mention occurs in dialogue during the optional side quest "Murdered Settler," which does not change the player's alignment. The quest will always trigger in a cutscene if the player passes by a small bridge within the Ancient Grove on Dantooine. The quest can be refused or dropped, and the dialogue can be navigated to avoid the mention of Tooka.<ref name="KOTOR" /> ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' confirms that both [[Gender/Legends|men]] were arrested, and therefore the quest completed.<ref name="CSWE" />
